chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Spl. Cr. Appeal No. D – 34 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.584/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of MA No.585/2023 (426 CrPC) 4. For hearing of main case 01.08.2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for Appellant Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< For the reasons to follow, this appeal is allowed. The impugned judgment dated 10.06.2023 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I / Special Judge for (CNS), Khairpur in Special Case No.05 of 2023 arising of Crime No.116/2022 of Police Station, Pir-Jo-Goth is set-aside. The appellant namely, Mumtaz Ali S/o Shamsuddin alias Shaman Bapar is acquitted of the charge. He shall be released forthwith, if not required in another custody case. Judge Judge ARBROHI
